---
name: Translate README
about: Add or improve a non-English README translation
title: "[translation] "
labels: translation, documentation
---

Thanks for helping make `everything-backend` accessible to more developers! 🌐

## Language

- [ ] Bahasa Indonesia (`README.id.md`) — already exists, improvements welcome
- [ ] Español (`README.es.md`) — already exists, improvements welcome
- [ ] 中文 (`README.zh.md`) — already exists, improvements welcome
- [ ] 日本語 (`README.ja.md`) — already exists, improvements welcome
- [ ] New language — please specify below

### New language

- Language name: [e.g. Français, Deutsch, 한국어, Português, العربية]
- ISO 639-1 code: [e.g. `fr`, `de`, `ko`, `pt`, `ar`]
- Suggested file name: `README.<code>.md`

## Source of truth

The English `README.md` is the source of truth. Please translate the **structure** as well as the content, and keep these in sync:

- The language switcher at the top (add a link to your new translation in **all** existing README files)
- The "Included skills" list
- The "Where to start" ordering
- All headings and code blocks (do not translate code or CLI flags)

## Self-review checklist

Before opening a PR, please confirm:

- [ ] File is named `README.<code>.md` in the repo root
- [ ] Language switcher is updated in every existing `README*.md`
- [ ] Skill names, code, paths, and CLI flags are not translated
- [ ] Markdown headings and link structure match the English file
- [ ] You can read the result and it makes sense (not raw machine output)

## Related

- Existing PRs / issues: [link any you found]
